name: Cream of Pumpkin Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 quarts Chicken stock -or- low-sodium chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 2-quart pot over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until onion softens, about 10 minutes.
3. Add the pumpkin and salt and continue to cook, stirring, another 15 minutes for fresh pumpkin or 5 minutes for canned.
4. Add the chicken stock, salt, coriander, curry, and pepper. Cover and increase heat to high.
5. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and place in a food processor or blender. Puree until smooth.
7. Combine puree, milk, and walnut oil. Cover and bring to the boil. Cook 2 minutes.
8. Serve piping hot.
